title: Adventure Reforged
description: This Multiplayer modpack has new dungeons, enemies and biomes. There is a lot of new content to explore with new mecanics for you to discover!
body:
![Aventure Reforged](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c80baa6cd7a1ee7a83d2c889efb5e978414c2a57.png)
## Welcome to Adventure Reforged!
A medieval world built for multiplayer, featuring over 500 unique structures, massive dungeons, and 450+ mobs (not counting variants).
The modpack introduces new mechanics, more creatures, and powerful bosses. Enemies grow stronger as you progress.
Will you be able to defeat all the bosses and conquer this new world?

###  Recommendations:
Allocate around 10 GB of RAM in your profile settings. This modpack can be played solo but is best enjoyed with friends. Using shaders and a high render distance is recommended for maximum immersion.

### Details:
This modpack offers a large gameplay experience. Updates will continue and Feel free to Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Z2EAmEmvrZ)
To Send suggestions, videos you’ve made about my modpack. (This really helps since I’m working alone on this modpack)

Love this pack? Donations on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/drunkcat2000)
 motivate me to make it even better!

[💖 **Support me on Ko-Fi**](https://ko-fi.com/drunkcat2000)  
[💬 **Join the Discord**](https://discord.gg/Z2EAmEmvrZ)


All mods belong to their respective creators. Full credit is given to each author.

### Known Issues:
World might go invisible when moving the screen while using shaders, press K to reload.
